project.name: Nico Hart
project.description: Product design, creative technology, and prototypes that make unfamiliar ideas usable.
project.author: Nico Hart

data.intro: I build useful interfaces, playful tools, and working prototypes that turn an ambitious idea into something people can understand immediately.
data.aboutTitle: From loose possibility to working system.
data.about: I work across product strategy, interaction design, visual systems, and front-end development. The goal is not simply to make an interface attractive; it is to make the whole idea easier to believe and use.
data.currently: Testing small products in public and turning the strongest ones into durable tools.
data.closingBody: The most interesting projects usually begin where the product, interface, and story are still tangled together.

projects.title: Orbit
projects.description: A lightweight planning tool that turns scattered commitments into one visible operating rhythm.

projects.title: Common Ground
projects.description: A structured conversation interface for comparing disagreement without flattening meaningful differences.

projects.title: Pulseboard
projects.description: A compact operating dashboard for teams that need decisions, risks, and momentum in one place.

projects.title: Elsewhere
projects.description: A generative travel journal that reorganizes memories by mood, texture, and accidental connection.

projects.title: Latch
projects.description: A focused onboarding system for products whose value is easy to lose inside a long setup process.

projects.title: Tiny Signals
projects.description: A small library of humane interface states for loading, saving, syncing, and uncertainty.
